description: The ProtoFluxOperationListManager component is used for the visuals in the Sequence and Async Sequence nodes.

fields.Visual: The ProtoFlux visual this is a part of.
fields.MinElements: The minimum number of items allowed in the list.
fields.AddButtonEnabled: The enabled field of the add element list.
fields.RemoveButtonEnabled: The enabled field of the remove element list.
fields._elements: The list of UI elements being used to display the elements in ``List``
fields.SupportsAsync: Whether the elements support Async input/output.

methods.AddElement: Called when the add element button is touched.
methods.RemoveElement: Called when the remove element button is touched.
